content: Fixed: Removed redundant response type aliases (IssueSummary, IssueListResponse, IssueListQuery, MilestoneListResponse, KnowledgePageSummary, AgentDetailContract, SyncActionResponse, UpdateConfigRequest, SessionResponse, UsageQuery, OkResponse). Inlined ConfigResponse and SyncStatusResponse as direct interfaces Config and SyncStatus.
